app.name: n8n
app.one_liner: A fair-code, self-hostable workflow automation platform that blends visual no-code design with code-level flexibility (JavaScript/Python) and native AI capabilities via LangChain.

screens.name: Workflow Editor
screens.purpose: Visual canvas for designing and configuring automation workflows using drag-and-drop nodes and connections.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a workflow configuration to storage.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for saving/loading workflows
week 1: Implement basic workflow editor UI
week 1: Set up monorepo structure with pnpm workspace
acceptance_tests: Data table columns in the editor UI refresh correctly after node configuration changes.
User can create a new workflow with at least two connected nodes and save it successfully.
